posts.text: Just noticed "Export your informationn" is a typo on the Instagram export privacy page, right at the top, and for some reason I find that funny https://privacycenter.instagram.com/guide/dyi/?entry_point=privacy_center_home

📝 Dark Patterns: A Rant About Meta

Meta makes it trivial to follow thousands of accounts and miserable to leave them

Meta and it's user interface dark patterns _really_ piss me off: they actively prevent you from unfollowing more than a few accounts at a time, while there is no rate limit for adding follows.

I've had an Instagram account for ~14 years, and over the years my idiot self has followed a LOT of accounts that I now want to cleanse. 4945 accounts, culled from an export of my followed list. To unfollow this many using the app (or web) is tedious and time consuming. Surely, there's a better way.

Do I have any thriends who are familiar with or better yet frequent users of FME Flow? I'd like to pick your brain.

Weird Sunday night question, I know.
